item.title: Edmunds: These are the new EVs we're most excited about in 2026
item.description: Electric vehicles are changing — in range, cost and practicality

item.title: A Russian-flagged tanker erupts in a massive fire and sinks off Libya
item.description: Libya says a Russian-flagged tanker carrying liquefied natural gas has exploded and erupted in flames before sinking in the Mediterranean Sea off the ...

item.title: Sri Lanka's navy says an Iranian warship has sunk off of the coast of the Indian Ocean island
item.description: Sri Lanka's navy says an Iranian warship has sunk off of the coast of the Indian Ocean island

item.title: Turkey says NATO defenses intercepted a ballistic missile launched from Iran before it entered Turkish airspace
item.description: Turkey says NATO defenses intercepted a ballistic missile launched from Iran before it entered Turkish airspace

item.title: Funding for Africa clean energy financing surges despite fewer project approvals
item.description: Africa’s flagship clean energy fund says it plans to more than double its financing to $2.5 billion over the next two years, as momentum builds behind...
